title: Panic panic: d.nx != 0 on push
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->


/kind bug


**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

On push, get `panic: d.nx != 0` in crypto/sha256.(*digest).checkSum

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Login to GCR

2. Push image which built locally successfully


**Describe the results you received:**

I've got a full panic message, and core dump as well. What's the best way to provide these?

```
gcloud auth print-access-token | podman login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin https://gcr.io
Login Succeeded!
podman push gcr.io/[redacted]
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob f1c9a075de3f done
Copying blob b3c09275c51c done
Copying blob fd4af127415b [>-------------------------------------] 2.4MiB / 83.8MiB
Copying blob 5b188fe045a4 done
Copying blob 24111d20d75e [--------------------------------------] 1.0MiB / 252.2MiB
Copying blob b05580fca2f9 [--------------------------------------] 8.0b / 200.5MiB
panic: d.nx != 0

goroutine 70 [running]:
panic(0x55eecc2dcc80, 0x55eecc5df010)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/panic.go:565 +0x2c9 fp=0xc0007d2a80 sp=0xc0007d29f0 pc=0x55eeca58d569
crypto/sha256.(*digest).checkSum(0xc0007d2ba0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go:262 +0x1f1 fp=0xc0007d2b30 sp=0xc0007d2a80 pc=0x55eeca7a5b61
crypto/sha256.(*digest).Sum(0xc0001f9280, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0xc0007d2cc8, 0x7c3a4dcb, 0x8facf8e95a615ccc)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go:238 +0x7a fp=0xc0007d2c30 sp=0xc0007d2b30 pc=0x55eeca7a577a
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/opencontainers/go-digest.NewDigest(0x55eecb924b83, 0x6, 0x55eecc649d20, 0xc0001f9280, 0x18, 0xc0007d2cc0)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/opencontainers/go-digest/digest.go:40 +0x48 fp=0xc0007d2c78 sp=0xc0007d2c30 pc=0x55eeca7b8ca8
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/opencontainers/go-digest.(*digester).Digest(0xc00058cf40, 0x55eecc62cdf8, 0xc0002af020)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/opencontainers/go-digest/digester.go:38 +0x4b fp=0xc0007d2cb8 sp=0xc0007d2c78 pc=0x55eeca7b958b
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/docker.(*dockerImageDestination).PutBlob(0xc0003de780, 0x55eecc645b60, 0xc0000c0028, 0x55eecc60aa60, 0xc0000c2020, 0x0, 0x0, 0xffffffffffffffff, 0x0, 0x0, ...)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/docker/docker_image_dest.go:172 +0x696 fp=0xc0007d3290 sp=0xc0007d2cb8 pc=0x55eecacd57b6
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*copier).copyBlobFromStream(0xc000304d80, 0x55eecc645b60, 0xc0000c0028, 0x7eff012d83f0, 0xc000632bc0, 0xc000362fa0, 0x47, 0xc877600, 0x0, 0x0, ...)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:1331 +0x578 fp=0xc0007d3828 sp=0xc0007d3290 pc=0x55eecb1abf98
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayerFromStream(0xc00036c840, 0x55eecc645b60, 0xc0000c0028, 0x7eff012d83f0, 0xc000632bc0, 0xc000362fa0, 0x47, 0xc877600, 0x0, 0x0, ...)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:1131 +0x1cb fp=0xc0007d39f8 sp=0xc0007d3828 pc=0x55eecb1ab32b
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayer(0xc00036c840, 0x55eecc645b60, 0xc0000c0028, 0xc000362fa0, 0x47, 0xc877600, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, ...)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:1073 +0x35f fp=0xc0007d3d68 sp=0xc0007d39f8 pc=0x55eecb1aa78f
github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayers.func1(0x0, 0xc000362fa0, 0x47, 0xc877600, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0xc0004618c0, 0x26, ...)
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:828 +0x416 fp=0xc0007d3f68 sp=0xc0007d3d68 pc=0x55eecb1b0d86
runtime.goexit()
        /usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:1337 +0x1 fp=0xc0007d3f70 sp=0xc0007d3f68 pc=0x55eeca5bb5d1
created by github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy.(*imageCopier).copyLayers.func2
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/libpod-1.9.0/_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/copy/copy.go:860 +0x207
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
No panic

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Happened a single time - next push failed with 
```
Error: Error copying image to the remote destination: Error writing blob: Error determining upload URL: http: no Location header in response
```

But that could be problem with infrastructure - pushes from outside of GCP work fine, same podman version

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman --version
podman version 1.9.0
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
debug:

  podmanVersion: 1.9.0

  cpus: 4
  distribution:

  eventLogger: journald
  hostname: behave
  idMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1001

      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
  kernel: 4.18.0-147.5.1.el8_1.x86_64
  memFree: 10750115840
  memTotal: 15589875712
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: runc-1.0.0-64.rc9.module_el8.1.0+298+41f9343a.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.1-dev'
  os: linux
  rootless: true
  slirp4netns:
    executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns
    package: slirp4netns-0.4.2-3.git21fdece.module_el8.1.0+298+41f9343a.x86_64
    version: |-
      slirp4netns version 0.4.2+dev
      commit: 21fdece2737dc24ffa3f01a341b8a6854f8b13b4
  swapFree: 0
  swapTotal: 0
  uptime: 48h 7m 40.19s (Approximately 2.00 days)
registries:
  search:
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - registry.centos.org
  - docker.io
store:
  configFile: /home/tramer/.config/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 5
    paused: 0
    running: 0
    stopped: 5
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions:
    overlay.mount_program:
      Executable: /usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs
      Package: fuse-overlayfs-0.7.2-5.module_el8.1.0+298+41f9343a.x86_64
      Version: |-
        fuse-overlayfs: version 0.7.2
        FUSE library version 3.2.1
        using FUSE kernel interface version 7.26
  graphRoot: /home/tramer/.local/share/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
[tramer@behave ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-1.9.0-4.1.el8.x86_64
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Centos 8 on GCP, podman from development repo.

comments.body: @mtrmac Looks like this is coming out of c/image's copy code?
Though it's going into the digest code, and deep enough that I'm really curious as to how it got there. It's not a segfault, and SHA256 should otherwise be pretty straightforward?
I had previously been running podman 1.6.4 and then updated to 1.9.0 just before this panic occurred. Images had been built and pushed using podman 1.6.4 successfully.

This is https://github.com/containers/image/issues/750 , see https://github.com/containers/image/issues/750#issuecomment-603953702 .

Avoiding the panic in common cases is trivial, handling the corner cases is more tricky WRT concurrency.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This should now be fixed in master branch, as far as I can see.  Reopen if I am mistaken.
